title: Pedilonum brinchangense
taxonomy: Pedilonum brinchangense is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of the Malay Peninsula. The classification of Pedilonum brinchangense includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Magnoliophyta, and class as Magnoliopsida. This plant belongs to the order Gentianales and family Rubiaceae. Further classification includes its genus as Pedilonum and species as P. brinchangense.
uses: Pedilonum brinchangense is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Malaysia. However, information on its medicinal uses is limited, and further research is needed to understand its potential health benefits.
